59672.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
59672.description: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.

59673.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
59673.description: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

59674.title: Anderson Cooper 360
59674.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

59675.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
59675.description: Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty and crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on the nature of Sicilian hospitality.

59676.title: Don Lemon Tonight
59676.description: Don Lemon presents the biggest stories, newsmakers, and spirited conversations of the day.

59677.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
59677.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

59678.title: World Sport
59678.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

59679.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
59679.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

59683.title: Early Start
59683.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

59685.title: World Sport
59685.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

59686.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
59686.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

59687.title: Connect the World
59687.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

59688.title: World Sport
59688.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

59689.title: Connect the World
59689.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

59691.title: Inside Africa
59691.description: Reports on African political and social issues from host Isha Sesay and correspondents across the continent.

59692.title: Amanpour
59692.description: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

59693.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
59693.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

59695.title: Quest Means Business
59695.description: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

59696.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
59696.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.
